issues.description: Main ability text describes a complex conditional action (rest DON, check field counts, check character types, add DON from deck) but DSL only shows Rest on all characters. Missing: conditional logic for DON count comparison, GERMA type check, AddDon action, SearchDeck/PlayFromDeck action, and proper targeting of DON cards specifically.
Target should be OwnDon (DON deck or field DON cards), not AllOwnCharactersAndLeader. Text specifies 'rest 1 of your DON!! cards' and 'add up to 2 DON!! cards from your DON!! deck'.

Missing conditions: TurnCount (implied 'equal to or less than'), HasCardOnBoard (opponent DON count check), LeaderHasAnyType (GERMA type requirement). DSL should include conditional structure with these checks.
